title: edritria glaucescens
intro: Edritria glaucescens, also known as the Australian prairie orchid or grass orchid, is a type of orchid native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits associated with Edritria glaucescens include relieving stomach pain, reducing inflammation, and aiding in digestion. Edritria glaucescens can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water, and it is also used in some herbal supplements and tinctures.
